title: Strangler of the Swamp
writer: Frank Wisbar, Leo J. McCarthy, Harold Erickson
actors: Rosemary La Planche, Robert Barrat, Blake Edwards
plot: A number of swamp land men have died by strangulation and the inhabitants believe that an innocent man they hanged is seeking revenge on all of the male descendants of those responsible for his death. Maria, granddaughter of the g...
